series_metadata.series_description: Records of complaints filed by employers, job seekers and migrant seasonal farm workers about services provided by the One Stop offices and associated documentation related to the complaints.

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Retain in office 3 years or until no administrative or legal value, then destroy. ; Electronic: Retain in office 3 years or until no administrative or legal value, then destroy., Paper: Shred ; Electronic: Erase
